description_long: This object consists of two vertically-oriented cylindrical tanks joined side by side with a horizontal metal brace. Each tank has a flat, circular top with visible bolts and a thick, black cable emerging from the center, looping between the tanks and extending outward. The tanks are primarily black with teal-gray end caps and feature prominent warning signage with electrical hazard symbols on the front. The surface appears metallic and robust, with subtle paneling and rivet details, suggesting industrial-grade construction. The overall design is compact and utilitarian, suitable for storing hazardous or high-voltage materials in an urban or industrial context.
description: A pair of black, cylindrical metal storage tanks joined by a brace, with cables and electrical hazard warning signs on the front. The tanks have teal-gray end caps and a rugged, industrial appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing both tanks, the connecting brace, and two prominent electrical hazard warning signs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical shape, the cable looping between the tanks, and the absence of signage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the tanks and the cables extending downward, with no visible signage.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the cable arrangement and the side profile of the tanks, with some warning signage partially visible.
